purpose_context: This stabilization mission addresses the highest-priority blockers found during the mission-state-audit-01KQHRB8 run so agents can rely on observable status transitions, isolated review prompts, canonical diffs, active work-package ownership, parseable sync diagnostics, deterministic merge/ship recovery, and review artifact consistency before 3.2.0 stable release.
purpose_tldr: Make the 3.2.0 implement, review, merge, and ship loop trustworthy enough for stable release work.
source_description: start-here.md requested one software-dev mission for the 3.2.0 stable-release workflow reliability blockers found during mission-state-audit-01KQHRB8.
